prompt:
Reference image role: the blog detail prototype defines the visual DNA — moonlit tree-hollow study room with bookshelves, an open writing desk, a glowing round paper moon-window, hanging lanterns, restrained Eastern xianxia mood. PRESERVE this DNA. Banner-style hero (shorter than full hero).

Create a wide hero banner for the blog article page top section of "灵木洞天 / LYDT". 16:9 wide format.

Composition:
- Right 55%: A study room nook inside the tree hollow — built-in wooden shelves with stitched books and scrolls visible on the upper walls, an old wood writing desk in foreground with an open paper book, brush and ink. A large round paper moon-window glowing cool moonlight over distant bamboo silhouettes. Two warm lanterns. Mossy roots.
- Left 45%: Dark intentionally quiet area for article title, breadcrumb, tags, metadata to be overlaid by HTML. NO text, NO UI in this image.

Color HEX: base #0B211D, wood #24180F, moss #33513A, lantern #ddb87a, moonlight #b8d4e0, firefly #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D.

Avoid: people, text, characters, browser frames, neon, purple, red, MMORPG, oversaturated, cartoonish.
